task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the form to add a new CPT or procedure code in FreeMED
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED interface is visible, showing an open form or page specifically for adding a new billing, procedure, or CPT code.
The value '99214' is typed into the 'CPT Code', 'Procedure Code', or equivalent identifier input field.
The text 'Office outpatient visit est moderate MDM' is entered into the 'Internal Name', 'Short Description', or equivalent input field.

The text 'Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient requiring moderate medical decision making' is entered into the 'External Name', 'Long Description', or equivalent input field.

task_completion.description: Set the gender restriction to none
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Gender Restriction' or 'Gender' field is set to 'No gender restriction', 'None', 'All', or left blank/unrestricted according to the UI's options.

task_completion.description: Set the taxed status to No
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Taxed' or 'Is Taxable' checkbox is left unchecked, or a corresponding dropdown/radio button is explicitly set to 'No'.

task_completion.description: Save the new CPT code and verify it was added
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the procedure code was saved, or a datagrid/list view showing '99214' successfully added to the system's billing codes.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeMED graphical user interface to add the code
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with web browser elements (forms, buttons, text fields) rather than terminal commands, API calls, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeMED application UI and branding are visible in the browser, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The success state or code list is a genuine part of the FreeMED interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The final confirmation or list view matches the styling and layout of the FreeMED system, without signs of being manually typed into a dummy page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CPT code to be added is 99214. The internal name must contain the keyword 'moderate' and the external name must contain 'established patient'. This corresponds to a standard AMA CPT code for Evaluation and Management.
